waitlist.hero_headline: The table is waiting for you
waitlist.hero_subtitle: DominoLive is the Chess.com of dominoes. Play in real-time, compete in rankings, and join a community of true domino lovers. Coming soon.
waitlist.success_message: You're in! We'll notify you when we launch.
waitlist.value_community: Join a community of true domino lovers
waitlist.tournament_headline: Exclusive access to the first tournament
waitlist.tournament_description: Join the waitlist now and get invited to the Founders Tournament when we launch. Only waitlist members can compete.

home.hero_subtitle: Rules, strategies, and culture of Latin American dominoes. Everything you need to master the table.
home.level_subtitle: Learn with quick lessons and proven methods from the world's best players, designed for all skill levels.
home.bots_subtitle: Build your partner table with characters of different skill levels.
home.app_subtitle: Carry dominoes in your pocket. Play quick matches, practice with bots, or challenge friends from anywhere.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Learn everything about dominoes: rules, strategies, and culture.

about.title: About Us
about.description: We are a team passionate about Latin American dominoes. Our mission is to preserve and share the domino tradition with the world.

footer.tagline: The definitive guide to Latin American dominoes.
